_description: Reference snapshot for a project with an active dev server bound to a port that is assigned in the Dev Port Registry. Indicators contributing: (1) hasLiveDevServer=true (port bound), (2) Dev Port Registry assignment present. With node_modules + vite.config.ts also present, antiFitScore reaches >=3. This is the canonical anti-fit case: spawning workers under git worktree isolation while a live dev server is bound risks port collision and runtime divergence between worktrees.

antiFitReasons: port 5173 assigned to 'demo-app' is currently bound (live dev server)
Dev Port Registry assignment(s) for this project: 1

expectedHeuristicVerdict: anti-fit-warn (regardless of file-touches disjointness — runtime state dominates)
_match: Field-shape match — environmentPrecondition is the contract: when the oracle runs in an environment matching this precondition, the output schema and antiFitScore lower bound (>=3) hold. Exact reasons-array contents may vary if MACHINE_CONFIG.md is updated, but the score floor and the principal indicators are stable.
